replies.msg: this is gay but great

My friend Paul is a gym membership salesman in pure fitness who'll be sending a follow-up email amd making a follow-up call to a customer who's interested in joining the eight year membership. I used to work in a gym amd whenever a customer paid a visit to the gym I always followed it up with a call or an email. Some of my colleagues followed it up with a visit to the customer. My friend Tomiko is interested in joining the gym Paul works in. She had a meeting at her office yesterday and a follow-up has been scheduled for tomorrow. She's also writing a follow-up to the acclaimed "The invisible man" so she's so busy that she won't have time to pay a follow-up visit to the gym for the time being. Therefore I handed Tomiko the gym membership agreement for Paul and will follow up with her in the next couple days. Last Tuesday, Tomiko complained that she was treated badly at Starbucks. As a result a barista provided a referral to a senior staff member who in turn referred her case to the branch manager. She'll follow the case up with the manager to be sure that it'll be dealt with seriously. In addition, she has been suffering from a stomachache and a stroke so I referred her to a gastroenterologist and a cardiologist. Recently, she posted on an online forum and suggested the government build an art gallery so as to boost tourism which was supported by many people on the forum. They asked the forum administrator for a referral to a district councilor. They'll follow up with the district councilor on the matter being discussed. Her suggestion of building an art museum so as to boost tourism is deemed necessary. Last Sunday, Paul and I went to the museum where we looked at every single huge nineteenth-century oil painting in minute detail so as not to miss any wonderful things. He threw a party in Rosewood hotel instead of his home yesterday so as not to bother his neighbouring homeowners. Last Saturday I had my personal training session in the gym and was soaking wet then I soaked in a jacuzzi for fifteen minutes. The gym is situated beside the jacuzzi where you can see the inside of the gym clearly. I saw a slender guy lift a light two pound dumbbell for all he was worth but still couldn't complete the exercise lol. I enjoy hitting the gym and I know my personal trainer is worth her salt as I'm making good progress with my physique. She's a vivacious, in-your-face woman who's sometimes too honest for her own good. I dislike working out in Physical Fotness because the salespeople there are way too in-your-face.
